mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (name, type, discount_type, discount_value, min_amount, max_discount, scope_type, scope_id, start_time, end_time, total_count, receive_count, per_limit, status, description, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{minAmount}, #{maxDiscount}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalCount}, #{receiveCount}, #{perLimit}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, discount_type, discount_value, min_amount, max_discount, scope_type, scope_id, start_time, end_time, total_count, receive_count, per_limit, status, description, create_time FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, type, discount_type, discount_value, min_amount, max_discount, scope_type, scope_id, start_time, end_time, total_count, receive_count, per_limit, status, description, create_time FROM coupon ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, name, type, discount_type, discount_value, min_amount, max_discount, scope_type, scope_id, start_time, end_time, total_count, receive_count, per_limit, status, description, create_time FROM coupon WHERE status = 1 AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) AND (total_count IS NULL OR receive_count < total_count) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET receive_count = receive_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
